post_preview_human_review_items.manual_readiness_check: Confirm the public preview does not imply permission to enter authenticated DevHub areas without the attending user selecting each destination.
expected_evidence: User attendance is required before any authenticated destination is observed.
Only read-only destination categories may be used.

post_preview_human_review_items.manual_readiness_check: Confirm private account, applicant, property, permit, payment, and document values will be redacted or omitted before any notes are retained.
expected_evidence: No credentials, tokens, cookies, auth state, screenshots, traces, HAR files, or private downloads are retained.
Private values are replaced with stable REDACTED placeholders when an offline example is needed.

post_preview_human_review_items.manual_readiness_check: Confirm the worker aborts before MFA automation, CAPTCHA handling, account creation, payment entry, upload, submission, certification, scheduling, cancellation, or private download paths.
expected_evidence: The worker stops before any consequential action control is activated.
The user performs security prompts manually or the run ends.
